cases.name: valid_utc_midnight
cases.note: UTC midnight — canonical form, always accepted

cases.name: valid_shanghai_midnight
cases.note: Beijing midnight (Asia/Shanghai UTC+8); equivalent UTC firing time is 16:00 previous day

cases.name: valid_extra_whitespace_normalized
cases.note: Extra internal whitespace is normalised to single spaces

cases.name: valid_every_5_minutes
cases.note: 5-field step expression with explicit TZ — accepted

cases.name: valid_weekly_sunday
cases.note: Weekly Sunday 20:00 Shanghai time; DOW 0 is standard POSIX

cases.name: reject_six_field_quartz_midnight
cases.note: Quartz 6-field with seconds AND '?' — metachar check runs first, reports '?'

cases.name: reject_six_field_no_quartz_char
cases.note: 6-field Quartz without metacharacters: leading '0' is seconds; no CRON_TZ prefix either

cases.name: reject_question_mark
cases.note: '?' is Quartz DOM wildcard; no robfig/cron equivalent — use '*' for 'any day'

cases.name: reject_L_char
cases.note: 'L' means last-day-of-month in Quartz; not supported by robfig/cron

cases.name: reject_W_char
cases.note: 'W' means nearest weekday in Quartz; not supported by robfig/cron

cases.name: reject_hash_char
cases.note: '#' means Nth weekday of month in Quartz; not supported by robfig/cron

cases.name: reject_implicit_tz_five_field
cases.note: Valid 5-field POSIX cron but missing CRON_TZ= prefix — rejected to prevent UTC/JVM-TZ drift; add CRON_TZ=UTC or CRON_TZ=Asia/Shanghai

cases.name: reject_implicit_tz_daily_2am
cases.note: Common 'every day at 2am' cron; ambiguous without TZ prefix — was this Shanghai 2am or UTC 2am?

cases.name: reject_six_field_with_tz_prefix
cases.note: Even with CRON_TZ prefix, 6 schedule fields are rejected
